case_title: ANGELES RODRIGUEZ RAMIREZ VS. PAUL V. ALVAREZ et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANGELES RODRIGUEZ AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, PAUL V. DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANGELES RODRIGUEZ SERVED AUG-31-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, PAUL V.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, PAUL V.
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, PAUL V.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANGELES RODRIGUEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, PAUL V. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4736 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, PAUL V.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, PAUL V.
